failedAssertions.reason: Lecture filter combobox visible but not interactable via Playwright automation - click on combobox times out
URL parameters not updated when filters are applied - URL remains /examples without filter params
Recent searches not displayed when search palette opens with empty input

appliedUpdates.description: Updated 12 Phase 2 assertions from failed/blocked to passed after fixes applied

fixesApplied.effect: Unblocked P2-LEC-003 through P2-LEC-008 which were all blocked by lecture content not rendering
Fixed P2-NAV-008 hover/focus states which were blocked by routing instability
Fixed keyboard navigation and Escape key behavior in search palette

systemicIssues.rootCause: Lecture filter combobox not properly exposed to Playwright
systemicIssues.description: The combobox element exists but all interactions timeout. This may be a custom UI component that Playwright cannot interact with standard methods.
When filters are applied to example explorer, the URL does not update with query parameters. This is a missing feature implementation.

systemicIssues.rootCause: Recent searches not persisted or displayed
systemicIssues.description: Search palette does not show recent searches when opened with empty input. localStorage may not be used to persist searches.

summary: Phase 2 user testing round 2: 40/43 assertions passing. Fixes applied (fix-lecture-content, fix-course-nav-routing, fix-search-keyboard) resolved 11 previously failed/blocked assertions. Remaining 3 failures require new fix features: P2-EXP-003 (lecture filter combobox), P2-EXP-008 (URL parameters), P2-SEARCH-004 (recent searches).
